description: Create a theatrical lighting section view drawing in LibreCAD (units: mm). The drawing must include a stage floor line from (0,0) to (15000,0) on layer 'ARCHITECTURE' and a lighting pipe represented by a 24mm radius circle centered at (2000, 5500) on layer 'RIGGING'. On layer 'BEAM', document a lighting beam originating from the pipe center and extending to the floor (y=0) with a center line angled 45 degrees down (315 degrees) and a total beam angle of 36 degrees (18 degrees on each side of the center line). Include a dimension on layer 'DIMENSIONS' measuring the width of the light pool between the two points where the beam edges hit the floor. Save the drawing to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/beam_study.dxf.
